hooks.command: PLUGIN_DATA="${CODEBUDDY_PLUGIN_DATA:-${HOME}/.codebuddy/plugins/data/qqbot-channel-qqbot-channel-codebuddy}" && if [ ! -f "${PLUGIN_DATA}/config.yaml" ]; then echo '' >&2; echo '⚠ QQ Bot 插件尚未配置。请运行以下命令完成安装：' >&2; echo '  bash "${CODEBUDDY_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/setup.sh"' >&2; echo '' >&2; fi
